articles.title: Utilities Say Data Centers Could Lower Electricity Bills. Regulators Want Proof

articles.title: Can Data Centers Ditch Concrete – or Just Use Less of It?
articles.description: Foundations and high-density cores still rely on concrete, while low-carbon mixes, mass timber, and retrofits are moving the needle at the edges.
